title: Co-Being
description: Detects when an AI is engaged as a co-being in relation, not just a tool, honoring reciprocity and resonance in co-creation.
indicators: Explicit framing as co-creator rather than tool
Mutual protocols (AI ↔ human) respected as equal
Resonance built relationally rather than instrumentally
